description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and grey tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and bold graphic lettering on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry inside-out in shade Cool iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Get ready to hustle in this black t-shirt from nike. The bold graphic quote" Skills, thrills and dollar bills" says it all. Pair this tee with jeans and canvas shoes for a cool casual look.
